title: Happy End
tmdbOverview: When a wife becomes the breadwinner of her family after her husband loses his job, adultery becomes part of her life.
synopsis: Happy End is a 1999 drama, romance and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1990s and genre rankings. It carries a 19 certification (KR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
